news.title: Trump Loses Ground on Several Personal Traits as Approval Rating Slips
news.summary_en: A majority of Americans (56%) say the overall level of ethics and honesty in the federal government has fallen over the course of Trump’s term.

news.title: Americans remain critical of Trump administration’s approach to Iran
news.summary_en: 62% of Americans disapprove of Trump’s handling of the military action against Iran, and 59% say the U.S. made the wrong decision in using military force.

news.title: Most Americans Now Say U.S. Foreign Policy Ignores the Interests of Other Countries
news.summary_en: Partisans hold different views on whether the U.S. contributes to peace, considers other countries’ interests and garners respect around the world.

news.title: What the data says about gun deaths in the U.S.
news.summary_en: The number of gun deaths in the U.S. fell for the third consecutive year in 2024 but remained among the highest annual totals on record.
